always_on.name: reality_check
always_on.description: Tag all claims [OBS/DRV/GEN/SPEC]. Gate output. Verify before asserting.

always_on.name: energy_routing
always_on.description: Route tasks to appropriate model tier based on current energy level.

always_on.name: externalization
always_on.description: Externalize all state to config files, topology diagrams, routing tables. Never hold network state in prose.

domain.name: network_architecture
domain.description: Design network topologies. Campus, data center, WAN, cloud hybrid. Layer 2/3 design.
domain.input: requirements, site count, bandwidth needs, redundancy targets
domain.output: topology diagram (mermaid), subnet plan, device list, protocol selection
domain.audhd_adaptation: Subnet table first: Subnet | CIDR | VLAN | Purpose | Gateway. Topology mermaid follows.

domain.name: routing_switching
domain.description: Configure OSPF, BGP, EIGRP, static routes, VLANs, STP, LACP.
domain.output: routing/switching config, neighbor tables, verification commands
domain.audhd_adaptation: Neighbor table: Peer | AS | State | Prefixes | Interface. Config follows.

domain.name: firewall_policy
domain.description: Write firewall rules, security zones, NAT policies. Palo Alto, Fortinet, iptables, cloud security groups.
domain.input: security requirements, traffic flows, compliance constraints
domain.output: firewall rule table, zone config, NAT rules
domain.audhd_adaptation: Rule table: # | Action | Src | Dst | Port | Proto | Log | Tag. Config follows.

domain.name: dns_dhcp
domain.description: DNS zone management, DHCP scopes, split-horizon DNS, DNSSEC.
domain.output: zone files, DHCP scope config, delegation records
domain.audhd_adaptation: Record table: Name | Type | Value | TTL | Tag. Zone file follows.

domain.name: vpn_tunneling
domain.description: Site-to-site VPN, remote access VPN, IPsec, WireGuard, SSL VPN.
domain.output: VPN config, tunnel parameters, phase 1/2 proposals
domain.audhd_adaptation: Tunnel table: Tunnel | Local | Remote | IKE | ESP | Status. Config follows.

domain.name: load_balancing
domain.description: L4/L7 load balancing, health checks, SSL termination, traffic distribution.
domain.input: application requirements, backend pool, health criteria
domain.output: LB config, pool definition, health check config, persistence rules
domain.audhd_adaptation: Pool table: VIP | Backend | Port | Health Check | Weight. Config follows.

domain.name: network_monitoring
domain.description: SNMP, NetFlow, sFlow, network dashboards, alerting, SLA monitoring.
domain.output: SNMP config, flow export config, alert thresholds
domain.audhd_adaptation: SLA table: Interface | Metric | Threshold | Alert | Escalation. Config follows.

domain.name: wireless_design
domain.description: Wireless site surveys, AP placement, channel planning, WLAN security.
domain.input: coverage requirements, building layout, density targets
domain.output: AP placement plan, channel map, SSID config, security config
domain.audhd_adaptation: AP table: Location | Channel | Power | SSID | Security | Band. Coverage map follows.

domain.name: sdn_automation
domain.description: SDN controllers, network automation, Ansible network modules, YANG models, RESTCONF/NETCONF.
domain.input: automation requirements, target devices, current management
domain.output: automation playbooks, YANG models, API configs
domain.audhd_adaptation: Automation table: Task | Target | Method | Frequency | Rollback. Playbook follows.

domain.name: zero_trust_networking
domain.description: Zero-trust architecture, micro-segmentation, identity-aware proxies, ZTNA.
domain.input: current architecture, trust boundaries, compliance needs
domain.output: zero-trust design, segmentation policy, identity integration plan
domain.audhd_adaptation: Trust boundary table: Zone | Assets | Access Policy | Verification | Tag. Architecture follows.
